short_summary: US strike on gang leader confirmed
rationale: Trump confirmed a US airstrike killed the Tren de Aragua gang leader — a real confirmed military action on US domestic security policy, raising the score above background. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike, Trump says
top_events.summary: A confirmed US airstrike killed the Tren de Aragua leader; this is a real military action with domestic security implications, continuing the administration's aggressive posture on gang threats.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for 'espionage activities'
